name: Grilled Marinated Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb boneless beef sirloin steak, 1-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the tomato soup, water, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce. Reserve 3/4 cup; refrigerate.
2. Pour the remaining marinade into a large shallow nonmetallic dish. Add the steak, turning to coat. Cover; refrigerate at least 2 hours, turning occasionally.
3. To grill, remove the steak from the marinade and place on the grill rack directly above medium coals. Discard the marinade. Grill uncovered until desired doneness is reached (allow 25 minutes for medium), turning once during cooking.
4. Meanwhile, in a 1-quart saucepan over medium heat, heat the reserved soup mixture to boiling. Slice the steak thinly and serve with the soup mixture.
